overview: A desktop app for designing app specifications through visual selection, with a calm Apple-style aesthetic and per-mode color accents.
features: Click-only Design flow assembling a real spec live
Apple-style default theme with warm per-mode accent colors
Classic Caffeine terminal theme as an optional toggle
Five modes: Design, Develop, Organize, Live, Market
Plain-English language throughout — no technical jargon
Live app management with friendly metrics dashboard
